Verbatim Comment: Absolutely perfect stay. Staff remembered my name after the first hour.
Food was good but wait times at breakfast were long on Sunday.
The room was immaculate. The turndown service was a lovely touch.
Check-in was smooth. The staff member offered great restaurant tips.
One of the best hotels I have stayed at in Waikiki. Will be back.
AC unit made noise at night. Maintenance came but it returned next day.
Concierge got us last-minute luau tickets. Incredible service.
Wonderful anniversary trip. The surprise flowers in the room were a beautiful touch.
Pool area is lovely. Could use more towel attendants on peak afternoons.
The happy hour at Wai Lounge was the highlight. Great cocktails.
Had to ask three times about a late checkout. Eventually resolved but frustrating.
Third time staying here. It keeps getting better. The GM clearly cares about this place.
Very clean and well-stocked. Appreciated the premium bath products.
Great location and friendly team. Valet was a bit slow on departure day.
Room was comfortable but could use an update to the bathroom fixtures.
